title: I save easily and joyfully
subtitle: A present-tense affirmation for replacing the effortful savings pattern with an easy one.
excerpt: A short affirmation from Day 38 of the MONEY program. For when the word "savings" still carries a sense of restriction and sacrifice rather than calm and satisfaction.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 38 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A short affirmation from Day 38 of the MONEY program. The pairing targets both the effort pattern and the reluctance pattern that savings often carry.
I save easily and joyfully. My savings grow without strain. I allow my savings to build naturally and stay.
Say it three times in the morning. On the third pass, let yourself picture the savings account number: not where it needs to be, but where it is right now, and that it is growing.
Adapted from Day 38 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
